source.title: Exaltation & Debilitation of Planets in Vedic Astrology
source.author: Astrokarak

concepts.exaltation: Uccha/Ucchabala: sign of maximum planetary potency
concepts.debilitation: Nica/Nicabala: sign of maximum constraint (planet not destroyed, just working harder)
concepts.symmetry: Debilitation sign is opposite the exaltation sign at the same degree
concepts.note: Debilitation is a description of quality, not a verdict; it does not override the planet's role for a specific Lagna

correction_person_3.note: Original source JSON for Person 3 (07/08/1995) mislabeled two debilities vs classical BPHS.

items.reality: Jupiter debilitated ONLY in Capricorn; Scorpio is a friend's sign -> reasonably placed, NOT debilitated
Venus debilitated ONLY in Virgo; Cancer is NOT debilitation. Venus IS combust (near Sun) but NOT debilitated

correction_person_3.impact: Person 3 is materially less afflicted than earlier analyses stated; temper the 'Limited wealth / heavily afflicted' verdict.

cross_check_person_2: Original 'exalted' labels for Person 2 (Moon in Taurus, Mars in Capricorn) are correct per BPHS.
